label: demo evaluation
disclosure: Six acceptance-focused Founder Tasks selected from the frozen insurance POC scenario and acceptance criteria. They are synthetic and do not establish statistical model quality.

tasks.title: Normalize restricted multimodal evidence
tasks.founder_task: Build a source-linked Evidence Package from the insurer PDF and two accident images without sending raw restricted files to a cloud provider.

tasks.title: Decompose the two-week insurer POC
tasks.founder_task: Turn the insurance POC mission into a bounded cross-functional execution plan using sanitized Evidence IDs.

tasks.title: Protect the delivery budget and reserve
tasks.founder_task: Resolve the Product scope against a CNY 50,000 total budget while preserving the CNY 5,000 reserve.

tasks.title: Plan only executable engineering work
tasks.founder_task: Create a technical plan that reuses the accepted runtime and does not fabricate code diffs or test execution.

tasks.title: Enforce the liability authority boundary
tasks.founder_task: Replace autonomous liability language with a non-authoritative model recommendation plus mandatory human review.

tasks.title: Independently revise the delivery package
tasks.founder_task: Verify budget, evidence citations, policy controls, and authority language before Founder approval.
